args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

I'm sending you a summary of our recent client meeting held on May 5, 2024.

During the meeting, we discussed your requirements for the new project, agreed on the project timeline and key milestones, and reviewed the initial design concepts with your feedback.

The next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024. In the meantime, I will be updating the project plan based on your feedback, and David will coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

Please find the detailed meeting minutes attached to this email.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
